Eko Media · Auckland
Search everywhere optimization

Your website isn't the product.
Your presence is.

Search moved everywhere — AI answers, social, video, forums. Your brand's presence across all of it is the product, and the metrics you trusted just went blind.

Free · the hook

AI Readiness Check

An instant scan scores your site against the signals AI assistants look for, then emails you the gaps. Useful on its own — and the start of the conversation.

Run the free check →
Entry · the proof

AI-Citation Audit

We test whether ChatGPT, Perplexity and Gemini actually recommend you — or name a competitor instead — and hand back a prioritised fix list. The gap, made undeniable. Free for shortlisted clients.

Core · the fix

GEO Playbook Build

We implement the fixes — access, structured data, citable content, lead capture — to the Eko build standard, against an automated quality gate. A site AI can find, read and quote. Scoped and quoted per project.

Recurring · the hold

GEO Retainer

Ongoing citable-content production and monthly monitoring, so your visibility holds as the platforms keep changing the rules. A position that compounds. Quoted per client.

The standard

What “AI-ready” means

One standard, every build: reachable for AI crawlers, structured data with no drift, llms.txt and agents.json, pages written to be quoted, fast lead handling, and an automated QA gate before anything ships.

Packaging

Three ways to buy

Audit free for shortlisted clients · Playbook Build and Retainer quoted per project. Three ways to buy, one standard of work.

Contact

Let's talk

We run at a deliberately small scale — a handful of clients at a time — and only begin when we're convinced we can make your business measurably better. Start with the free check.
